overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored character walking through a desolate coastal wasteland. The character traverses a rocky canyon with a massive wrecked airship, transitions onto an open sandy beach, and approaches a distant fortress under dramatic overcast skies. The environment features towering rock formations, scattered debris, and crystalline deposits.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the canyon toward the wrecked airship ahead

entered.detail: massive crashed airship with broken wings lodged between the canyon walls
tall reddish-brown cliff face lining the left side of the canyon
dark gray rocky cliff lining the right side of the canyon
smoldering debris and burning metal fragments scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with steep red and gray cliffs on either side. A massive wrecked airship dominates the view ahead, lodged between the canyon walls. Around the 10-second mark, the character passes burning debris scattered on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with ocean views

events.description: exiting the narrow canyon onto the open beach with ocean visible ahead
distant fortress structure becomes visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across the sandy beach toward the distant fortress structure

entered.detail: calm ocean waters visible beyond the beach with waves lapping at the shore
large ancient stone fortress structure sitting atop a rocky outcrop on the coast
clusters of red crystalline formations growing from the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character exits the canyon onto a wide sandy beach. The ocean becomes visible to the left and ahead, while the wrecked airship disappears behind. A distant fortress comes into view on the horizon, and red crystalline formations appear on the right side of the beach.

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the fortress as it grows larger in the frame

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking across the open wasteland toward the fortress, which now dominates the center of the view and appears significantly closer. The canyon cliffs have faded into the distance, leaving only the sandy beach, the approaching fortress, and the red crystalline formations visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into a vast, open coastal wasteland. It begins with the character walking between steep red and gray cliffs toward a massive wrecked airship lodged between the walls, passing burning debris scattered along the path. As the character exits the canyon, the scene opens up onto a wide sandy beach where the ocean appears to the left and the airship fades behind. The view then expands to reveal red crystalline formations on the right and a distant fortress emerging on the horizon. Finally, the camera pushes forward across the open wasteland as the canyon cliffs recede, leaving the imposing fortress to dominate the center of the frame.
